title: Is The S2 Engine The Fruit of Life
display_title: Is The S2 Engine The Fruit of Life
wikitext:
[]: Is The S^2 Engine The "Fruit of Life"?             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Nov 14, 2009 2:35 pm Fuyutsuki says in End of Evangelion Episode #26' wrote: Fuyutsuki : The Fruit of Life possessed by Angels, And the Fruit of Wisdom possessed by humans...

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 14, 2009 3:05 pm The standard interpretation is that the Fruit of Life refers to the S^2 engine. But what evidence do we have for this? Is this in fact what is being referred to here?

[]:             Quote Post by Mello » Sat Nov 14, 2009 3:14 pm I'd also like to point out the fact that the "fruit of life" and the "fruit of knowledge" could be figuritive Humans have the "fruit of knowledge" thus our power comes from science: the things we use to defend ourselves our created by us Ie: the evas, bombs guns etc while the angels on the other hand with the "fruit of life" use only things produced by their own body to defend themeselves: their own A.T.fields, positron beams, mental attacks etc so humans can destroy only using tools, and angels can destroy using only themeselves[ the acception I can see is the use of eva 02 by kaworu though ] obviously this is just a theory and probably has flaws that I'm not paying attention too

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Nov 14, 2009 3:46 pm AuraTwilight wrote: It comes from the Classified Information, which is pretty much from Hideaki Anno's own mouth.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Nov 14, 2009 3:55 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Kaworu possesses one, as he's an ADO, but Lilith is not, and does not possess one.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 14, 2009 8:29 pm What about Lilith? (Usually grouped under the LDO umbrella)

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Nov 14, 2009 8:46 pm AuraTwilight wrote: She doesn't have an S2 Engine.

[]:             Quote Post by Layla » Thu Dec 03, 2009 5:29 pm What is the evidence for Kaworu containing an S2 organ? Sure, if Kaworu truly was the result of the contact experiment with Adam, it is plausible that he somehow obtained it, but it seems unlikely. We would have to assume that Rei also has an S2 organ, which seems impossible. If this were the case: 1) NERV would've already performed experiments with Rei's organ. 2) Each time Rei is murdered, exploded, etc. they'd have to either transplant the organ (in the case of Rei I to Rei II) or artificially create another (Rei II to Rei III). 3) Do the Rei/Kaworu clones used for the Dummy System get the organs as well? This means that they have long had the technology to produce the artificial organs.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Dec 03, 2009 6:07 pm Layla's points are compelling. It is clear that whatever Kaworu and Rei possess, it cannot be the the S^2 organ used by Angels and Evas. Perhaps they might, at most, have some other variant of the organ, but this is really as far as speculation can go. It is clear they do not possess the power source Nerv were looking for. Which raises the next question: Where do Kaworu and Rei obtain their energies from? Perhaps this is related to the question of where Unit-01 obtains its "berserk" energies from.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Thu Dec 03, 2009 6:44 pm Does Rei display any superhuman ability in the show at all? It seems like both she and Kaworu just have human bodies but with angel souls.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Dec 03, 2009 6:59 pm chaosakita wrote: Does Rei display any superhuman ability in the show at all? It seems like both she and Kaworu just have human bodies but with angel souls.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Dec 03, 2009 7:32 pm The way I see it, the Seed of Life is a part of the soul representing "lifeforce" or the "energy of life", which the Angels have in plenty. The Seed of Knowledge would represent the power of self-awareness, of imagination, of love and emotion: a physical manifestation of the Western notion of the soul. I see it more like ADOs and LDOs actually have both aspects of the soul, except that ADOs have a Seed of Life orders of magnitude more powerful than LDOs, while LDOs have a Seed of Knowledge far more developed and advanced than ADOs. An Evangelion or the union of Seeds of Life would represent a tremendous advancement in the power of both aspects of the soul. Mind you, this is just a pet theory of mine. I have no idea how much sense it makes to others.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Dec 04, 2009 4:51 am What is the evidence for Kaworu containing an S2 organ? Sure, if Kaworu truly was the result of the contact experiment with Adam, it is plausible that he somehow obtained it, but it seems unlikely. We would have to assume that Rei also has an S2 organ, which seems impossible.
